title: split dev-flow skill into plan/execute, stage brett controls redesign
description:
## Summary
- Retire monolithic `dev-flow` skill; replace with `dev-flow-plan` (planning phase) and `dev-flow-execute` (implementation phase) split skills
- Add `dev-flow-overview.html` reference doc for the new split workflow
- Update `CLAUDE.md` default workflow section to reference the new skills
- Stage brett controls redesign spec + plan for later execution

## Test Plan
- [ ] Verify `dev-flow-plan` skill invokes correctly on a new feature/fix/chore request
- [ ] Verify `dev-flow-execute` skill picks up a staged plan and proceeds with implementation
